canonical_definition: An enterprise database benchmark with 99 tables used to evaluate ambiguous and unanswerable semantic parsing tests in a real-world setting.
papers: VeriFact: Enhancing Long-Form Factuality Evaluation with Refined Fact Extraction and Reference Facts
